open_play_schedule: Pickleball only available during winter for a fee and only during scheduled gym times

name: Chip's Pickleball Club
description:
Not your average Pickleball club - It’s clear the moment you walk in the door - Chip’s is different. Not only does this space lend itself to fun & competitive pickleball play, but it’s so much more than that.

TWELVE COURTS
We feature 12 dedicated pickleball courts with tournament-sized playing margins and chain-link fence barriers so you can play your best game. 

CAFE & BAR
Our people are everything at Chip’s. We intentionally created spaces like our cafe & bar for gathering and enjoying time together. Our curated selection of drinks and delicious food can also be enjoyed courtside!

PRIVATE EVENT SPACE
From corporate events to your kid’s birthday party, this is the spot to be. We created this space to gather privately and play on dedicated courts so that you and your group can create memorable experiences together. Capacity for groups up to 50+

SAUNA & COLD PLUNG
We are here to support your active lifestyle with top-notch recovery tools. Our sauna and cold plunge are among the best for recovery, and we have onsite showers for your convenience.

We’ve also built spaces for stretching and strength exercises so that we can be a one-stop shop for improving and maintaining your fitness.
fees: Fee required — Open play, leagues, private court reservations, and membership options.

name: Hastings Roadside Pickleball Courts
description: 8 new pickleball courts have been constructed in Hastings at the Roadside Park. Courts are individually fenced with seating in a common gathering area. Pickleball play is open to all players. Organized play takes place at varying times (morning, afternoon, evening) throughout the year depending on time of season; spring, summer or fall. Visitors are welcome.

name: Hastings YMCA
description: The Hastings YMCA has a large gym with specific designated hours for pickleball play all year long. Check the Hastings YMCA on line gym schedule for hours and # of courts for play. All play is open to all skill levels with players rotating in on a 'next up' basis. Lessons and tournaments are scheduled throughout the year. You must be a Y member or be a guest of an existing Y member.

name: Hope Fieldhouse
description: Hope Fieldhouse is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rosemount, MN. There are 12 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms, locker rooms, food, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility.
